evidence_text:
[Image #1] notice how the "Talk to other agents" channel has messages (it does, if you want, use nak to look in the relays) yet: [Image #2] when I tap inside there's nothing!

remember, if this is anywhere close to an NMP bug we MUST fix it right in NMP -- something like this should be trivial for an NMP app, so if it doesn't work properly we need to get to the bottom of why it doesn't work, how 29er codebase could have gotten this wrong and how to avoid it.

Don't fix it, explain to me why it's not working.
topic: The user is probing why messages visible in the group list preview do not appear when that group room is opened in the timeline.

evidence_text: User: how about now? nmp moved on quite a bit since you last looked
topic: The user is probing whether NMP's late-observer hydration semantics have been updated since an earlier identified bug.
